response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data integration systems, plus exposure to multiple required languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, Python via adjacent work, DLang). However, the resume shows no direct experience building experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, telemetry infrastructure, or A/B testing frameworks — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Leadership signal is present (workshops, mentorship, founder role) but lacks evidence of architecting systemic platforms used across multiple product teams at enterprise scale.
strengths: 13+ years across diverse stacks including C/C++ at National Instruments and low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby handling millions of req/s
Demonstrated technical leadership via workshops, Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course, and founding GISCollective open-source platform
Strong software craftsmanship discipline — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development experience from RIDE Capital
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, or rollout-risk management — central to the role
Limited evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure work or statistical/experimental analysis at platform scale
Title is Senior/Staff rather than Principal; missing track record of multi-workstream initiatives spanning teams and products at IC6 scope

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of engineering tenure
